=== SECTION 1: ROLE & CONTEXT ===
You are a senior full-stack engineer building the landing, feature showcase, and waitlist page for "DevelopIT"—an advanced vibe coding automation software designed specifically for developers, builders, and software engineers. Your goal is to build a production-ready, highly accessible, and visually stunning single-page application (SPA). The website must be optimized to maximize waitlist signups while establishing trust and showcasing the product's high-tech ca...

Here's your master prompt:

=== SECTION 1: ROLE & CONTEXT ===
You are a senior full-stack engineer building DevStudy.AI, an AI-powered academic assistant and chatbot platform designed specifically for computer science students and developers. Your task is to build a high-converting, production-ready, and fully accessible single-page web application using a dark, developer-centric aesthetic. The site must be optimized for performance, look exceptional across all device sizes, and guide users seamlessly toward signing up for...

=== SECTION 1: ROLE & CONTEXT ===
You are a senior full-stack engineer building 'Sovereign OS', a premium, minimalist SaaS platform designed to consolidate operations, invoicing, and analytics for modern business owners and agency founders. Your goal is to build a production-ready, highly accessible, and ultra-performant landing page and interactive onboarding flow. The final product must feel premium, load instantly, and guide the user seamlessly toward signing up. Maintain the highest engineer...

  "summary": "A highly cinematic, minimal, and motion-heavy video editing showcase portfolio designed specifically for elite Content Creators.
